title: UPI Payment Integration for WooCommerce
overview: A direct peer-to-peer UPI checkout extension for WooCommerce merchants, bypassing standard processing commissions.
problem: Traditional e-commerce payment processors charge commission rates (2%+) per transaction, significantly reducing operating margins for small businesses.
solution: Engineered a direct bank-to-bank gateway extension that encodes invoice amounts into dynamic UPI QR codes, validating transactions instantly via banking APIs.
challenges: Ensuring client-side validation checkouts remain secure without introducing intermediary database server latency.
impact: Successfully acquired after gaining strong adoption within the WooCommerce ecosystem.

title: Razorpay Payment Links for WooCommerce
overview: Automation tool that generates and emails secure payment links for e-commerce invoices.
problem: Manual billing operations and static checkout prompts lead to high shopping cart abandonment rates.
solution: Built a backend state hook that generates unique Razorpay payment links upon invoice creation, routing alerts automatically to buyers.
challenges: Integrating hooks into the WooCommerce checkout lifecycle safely without blocking order status triggers.
impact: Successfully acquired after gaining strong adoption within the WooCommerce ecosystem.

title: WP Last Modified Info
overview: A web performance and search engine optimization (SEO) utility that injects true modification date schemas.
problem: Stale publication date variables in search indexes reduce search engine click-through rates.
solution: Engineered a lightweight hook layout that overrides template headers with structured Schema.org JSON-LD microdata markers.
challenges: Ensuring structural integrity across both Gutenberg layouts and dynamic legacy theme templates.
impact: Reached over 20,000+ active installs and 1,000,000+ downloads (verified via [WordPress.org Plugin Stats](https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-last-modified-info/advanced/)).

title: RevivePress
overview: An automated content scheduler that republishes aged blog entries to revitalize organic search index ranking.
problem: Archived blog pages lose crawler positioning, resulting in passive traffic degradation.
solution: Built a custom scheduler queue utilizing the high-performance WooCommerce Action Scheduler engine, protecting system memory.
challenges: Managing concurrent cron task queues safely across varied shared web hosting configurations.
impact: Maintained at 7,000+ active installs with high user satisfaction ratings on the official repository.

title: Gutena Blocks & Theme
description: High-performance Gutenberg block layout suite. Led React components architecture for tabs and accordion widgets.

title: Projectopia
description: Premium client project management software. Refactored invoicing engines and billing gateways.

title: Responsive Menu
description: Customizable menu layout manager. Patched accessibility targets and optimized script bundle sizes.

title: Quiz And Survey Master (QSM)
description: WordPress quiz architect. Built dynamic reporting graphs and dashboard telemetry adapters.

title: Connect Helpers
description: Internal Composer PHP helper library coordinating InstaWP staging environments sync structures.

title: Ultimate Facebook Comments
description: Embeds dynamic Facebook comment moderation systems inside blog layouts.
